result_summary: Append receipts have strictly increasing tree_size and leaf_index under generated sequences.
allowable_public_claim: May claim append-only behaviour for the local A2 reference implementation only.
forbidden_wording: Do not claim distributed append-only service or production log guarantee.

result_summary: Generated inclusion receipts verify against their object, leaf index, tree size, proof and checkpoint root.
forbidden_wording: Do not claim HL7/IHE validation or external witness.

result_summary: Payload and evidence-field mutations are rejected by bound receipts.
forbidden_wording: Do not claim full cryptographic security proof.

result_summary: Canonical bytes/hashes are invariant to dictionary insertion order for generated JSON-like objects and exclude canonical_hash from the material hash.
forbidden_wording: Do not claim RFC 8785 conformance unless separately validated.

property: Receipt self-consistency/path binding and checkpointed tree-size rejection
result_summary: Wrong object, evidence_id, leaf_hash, leaf_index, root_hash, proof and coherent-looking index/tree-size relabelling are rejected.
allowable_public_claim: May claim local receipt self-consistency/path-binding under checkpointed verification.
forbidden_wording: Do not describe receipt_digest as a signature, notarisation or external witness.

result_summary: Historical prefix roots are accepted and wrong-size/wrong-root checkpoints are rejected.
allowable_public_claim: May claim prefix-consistency-by-recomputation in the reference implementation.
forbidden_wording: Do not claim compact RFC-style consistency proof.

result_summary: Divergent same-size logs from a shared prefix produce different roots in generated cases and are detectable if verifier compares roots.
allowable_public_claim: May claim verifier-visible same-size root-comparison detection under collision-resistance assumptions.
